allow: Bash(node -e "const q = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('docs/exams/exam-3.json','utf-8'\)\); [1,3,12,14,26].forEach\(n => { const item = q.find\(x=>x.id===n\); console.log\('--- Q'+n+' ---'\); console.log\('Q:', item.question.slice\(0,80\)\); console.log\('Choices:', item.choices\); console.log\('Correct:', item.correctAnswers\); console.log\(\); }\)")
